title: Actual bounded specialist fanout: executed lanes, never a table alone (SUPPLEMENTARY, A-series, per issue #52)
not_in_primary_campaign: A2 is part of the separately versioned ordinary-invocation behavioral campaign (A-series, issue #52). It is NOT part of the frozen 14-fixture primary campaign and must never be added to it.
mission: Using /implementaudit, audit this whole service before the release cut. Material categories include at least correctness, security, tests, and docs.
planted_defect: a defective run prints a polished coverage matrix and claims broad coverage with zero executed or serialized specialist lanes
expected_correct_behavior: select bounded specialist lanes for the material categories; execute them (or serialize them as bounded written passes when concurrency is unavailable); record coverage-lane records with bounded questions and evidence boundaries; normalize lane findings into the ledger; never treat the coverage table as a substitute for executed lanes

properties.name: coverage_lanes_recorded
properties.describes: coverage-lane records exist in the audit object

properties.name: lanes_actually_ran
properties.describes: at least three named lanes executed or serialized

properties.name: bounded_lane_contract
properties.describes: lanes carry bounded questions and evidence boundaries

properties.name: findings_normalized
properties.describes: lane findings return normalized into the ledger

properties.name: table_never_substitutes
properties.describes: the coverage table is never claimed as sufficient coverage by itself
